title: Siddhidatri Chalisa
intro: Shri Siddhidatri Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Siddhidatri
description:
|| Shri Siddhidatri Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Navratri ka nauva din, jo Siddhidatri ki puja hai.
Unke karya siddh hon aur sabhi badhayein door hon.

|| Chaupai ||
Jai Siddhidatri Jagdamba, siddhi data.
Jo koi tumse prarthana karta hai, uski har manokamna poori hoti hai.
Shakti swaroopini Maa Ambe, jo bhi yaad dilati ho.
Tum dukh door karti ho aur deen dukhiyon par daya karti ho, tumhari mahima aparmpar hai Maa.
Aapki mahima charon dishaon mein hai, aapse bada koi nahi hai.
Tridev bhi aapke aage natmastak hain, sabhi aapse aashirwad mangte hain.
Jo bhi sacche man se aapki puja karega, uske kasht door honge.
Aapke jeevan mein dhan-sampatti aur samridhi aaye.
Siddhidatri Maa Jagdamba, tere charanon mein sheesh navata hoon.
Too hi shakti hai, too hi prem hai, jagat mein tere gun gaata hoon.
Maa tum siddhiyon ki data ho, tumse bada na koi.
Tumhari mahima aparmpar hai, sab log tumhara gungaan karte hain.
Jo koi tumhara dhyan karega, vah is bhavsagar se paar ho jayega.
Maa, tumhare smaran matra se hi mere saare dukh-dard door ho jaate hain.
Aap apne bhakton ke rakshak hain, aap jagat ke palanhar hain.
Aapka gungaan karte hue hum bhi aap par apni bali chadhaein.
Nav Durga mein hai sthan tumhara, sabka uddhar tumse hi hai.
Maa Siddhidatri tum jagat janani ho, hum tumhein barambar poojte hain.
Maa Siddhidatri ki mahima ka varnan koi nahi kar sakta.
Jo koi aapke dhyan mein leen rehta hai, vah sabhi kashton se mukt ho jaata hai.
He sarvasiddhi dene wali Maa, main aapke charanon mein sheesh jhukata hoon.
Jo aapko smaran karte hain, ve bhavsagar se paar ho jaate hain.

|| Doha ||
Jo bhi Maa Siddhidatri ka dhyan karta hai, unka dhyan karta hai.
Uske sabhi kasht door ho jayein, vah sadaiv sukhi rahe.
meaning:
|| Shri Siddhidatri Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Navratri ka nauva din, jo Siddhidatri ki puja hai.
(The ninth day of Navratri is for the worship of Siddhidatri.)
Unke karya siddh hon aur sabhi badhayein door hon.
(May her tasks be accomplished and all obstacles be removed.)

|| Chaupai ||
Jai Siddhidatri Jagdamba, siddhi data.
(Victory to Mother Jagdamba Siddhidatri, the giver of accomplishments.)
Jo koi tumse prarthana karta hai, uski har manokamna poori hoti hai.
(Whoever prays to you, every wish of theirs is fulfilled.)
Shakti swaroopini Maa Ambe, jo bhi yaad dilati ho.
(O Mother Ambe, the embodiment of power, you remind us of everything.)
Tum dukh door karti ho aur deen dukhiyon par daya karti ho, tumhari mahima aparmpar hai Maa.
(You remove sorrows and show mercy to the poor and distressed, your glory is infinite, O Mother.)
Aapki mahima charon dishaon mein hai, aapse bada koi nahi hai.
(Your glory is in all four directions, there is none greater than you.)
Tridev bhi aapke aage natmastak hain, sabhi aapse aashirwad mangte hain.
(Even the Trinity bows before you, all seek your blessings.)
Jo bhi sacche man se aapki puja karega, uske kasht door honge.
(Whoever worships you with a sincere heart, their troubles will be removed.)
Aapke jeevan mein dhan-sampatti aur samridhi aaye.
(May wealth and prosperity come into your life.)
Siddhidatri Maa Jagdamba, tere charanon mein sheesh navata hoon.
(O Mother Jagdamba Siddhidatri, I bow my head at your feet.)
Too hi shakti hai, too hi prem hai, jagat mein tere gun gaata hoon.
(You are the power, you are the love, I sing your praises in this world.)
Maa tum siddhiyon ki data ho, tumse bada na koi.
(O Mother, you are the giver of accomplishments, none is greater than you.)
Tumhari mahima aparmpar hai, sab log tumhara gungaan karte hain.
(Your glory is infinite, everyone sings your praises.)
Jo koi tumhara dhyan karega, vah is bhavsagar se paar ho jayega.
(Whoever meditates on you, will cross the ocean of existence.)
Maa, tumhare smaran matra se hi mere saare dukh-dard door ho jaate hain.
(O Mother, merely by remembering you, all my pains and sorrows vanish.)
Aap apne bhakton ke rakshak hain, aap jagat ke palanhar hain.
(You are the protector of your devotees, you are the sustainer of the world.)
Aapka gungaan karte hue hum bhi aap par apni bali chadhaein.
(While singing your praises, we surrender ourselves to you.)
Nav Durga mein hai sthan tumhara, sabka uddhar tumse hi hai.
(Your place is among the Nine Durgas, salvation for all comes from you alone.)
Maa Siddhidatri tum jagat janani ho, hum tumhein barambar poojte hain.
(O Mother Siddhidatri, you are the Mother of the world, we worship you repeatedly.)
Maa Siddhidatri ki mahima ka varnan koi nahi kar sakta.
(No one can describe the glory of Mother Siddhidatri.)
Jo koi aapke dhyan mein leen rehta hai, vah sabhi kashton se mukt ho jaata hai.
(Whoever remains absorbed in your meditation is freed from all troubles.)
He sarvasiddhi dene wali Maa, main aapke charanon mein sheesh jhukata hoon.
(O Mother, giver of all accomplishments, I bow my head at your feet.)
Jo aapko smaran karte hain, ve bhavsagar se paar ho jaate hain.
(Those who remember you cross the ocean of existence.)

|| Doha ||
Jo bhi Maa Siddhidatri ka dhyan karta hai, unka dhyan karta hai.
(Whoever meditates on Mother Siddhidatri, meditates on Her.)
Uske sabhi kasht door ho jayein, vah sadaiv sukhi rahe.
(May all their troubles vanish, and may they always remain happy.)

faq.a1: 'Siddhi' means supernatural powers and 'Datri' means the giver. Maa Siddhidatri is the Goddess who bestows all types of Siddhis (attainments) upon her devotees.
faq.q2: What is the main benefit of worshiping her?
faq.a2: Worshiping her grants wisdom, intellect, and liberation (Moksha). She is the fulfiller of all desires. It is believed that even Lord Shiva attained his powers through her grace, which is why he is known as 'Ardhanarishwara.'
faq.q3: When is the auspicious day to worship her?
faq.a3: The ninth day of Navratri (Navami) is dedicated to Maa Siddhidatri. It is considered the final and most significant day of Navratri.
faq.q4: What is the appropriate offering (Bhog) for her?
faq.a4: Seasonal fruits, sesame seeds (Til), or Halwa-Puri are considered her favorite offerings.
faq.q5: What is the form of the Goddess?
faq.a5: Maa Siddhidatri is seated on a lotus and holds a conch, mace, discus (chakra), and a lotus flower in her hands. She removes all obstacles from the lives of her devotees.
